    "R1.6": "The user explicitly asked to polish the passage, requiring sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and flow improvements without changing content.",
    "RX.1": "Polishing should preserve and clearly convey any uncertainty or caveats already present in the text.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must not strengthen or expand claims beyond what the original wording supports.",

rationale.R1.6: The user explicitly asked to polish the passage, requiring sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and flow improvements without changing content.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing should preserve and clearly convey any uncertainty or caveats already present in the text.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must not strengthen or expand claims beyond what the original wording supports.
rationale.RX.3: Scope is limited to language polish, avoiding structural changes, new analysis, or content additions.
rationale.RX.4: Wording should avoid creating misleading interpretations about climate or agricultural impacts.
rationale.RX.5: Edits must maintain fidelity to the source text so readers can trace statements back to the original content.
